SPICED_Situation__c: Acme is migrating from legacy CRM to modern stack. VP Ops leading initiative.
SPICED_Pain__c: Manual reporting taking 10+ hours/week across sales team.
SPICED_CriticalEvent__c: End of Q2 — internal deadline set by VP Ops.
SPICED_Decision__c: VP Ops is decision maker. Procurement involved for contracts over $50k.
SlipReason_RepNote: Customer asked to push to June — budget cycle issue.

SPICED_Situation__c: Series B startup scaling GTM team from 5 to 20 reps.
SPICED_Pain__c: No visibility into pipeline health. CEO flying blind on forecast.
SPICED_Impact__c: Board requires reliable forecast before Series C raise.
SPICED_CriticalEvent__c: Board meeting June 15 — needs data by then.
SPICED_Decision__c: CRO makes final call. CFO signs.

SPICED_Situation__c: Regional hospital network consolidating 3 separate analytics platforms.
SPICED_Pain__c: Clinical ops team spending 15hrs/week on manual reconciliation.
SPICED_Impact__c: Compliance risk if reporting not unified before audit season.
SPICED_CriticalEvent__c: HIPAA audit scheduled for September — needs implementation complete.
SPICED_Decision__c: COO + General Counsel co-sign. IT Director veto right.
SlipReason_RepNote: Legal redlines took longer than expected. Deal closing first week of June.
